definition:
1. bold, spirited, courageous, confident , (Homer), attic; θρασεῖα τοῦ μέλλοντος full of confidence  for the future, (Thucydides) 
2. in bad sense, over-bold, rash, venturous , Lat. audax, (Odyssey by Homer), attic 
3. of things, to be ventured , with infinitive, θρασύ μοι τόδ᾽ εἰπεῖν this I am bold  to say, (Pindar); οὐκ ἆρ᾽ ἐκείνῳ προσμῖξαι θρασ; (Sophocles Tragicus) 
4. adverb -έως: comparative θρασύτερον, too boldly , (Thucydides) (ML)
